name: chipactli
description: Sistema de control de insumos para cosmética sólida - Chipactli

scripts.dev: npm run guard:local && npm run free:dev-ports && concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && node server.js"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run guard:local && cd backend && node server.js
scripts.dev:all: npm run guard:local && npm run free:dev-ports && concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && node server.js"
scripts.start: npm run guard:local && cd backend && node server.js
scripts.install:all: npm run guard:local && npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run prepare-assets && cd backend && npm install
scripts.build: npm run guard:local && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run prepare-assets && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend install

author: alexxcrz
